chunks.text: IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. S – 224 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on CMA No.697/2024 (U/A) 2. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 3. For orders on CMA No.698/2024 (Ex.A) 4. For hearing of main case 07.03.2025 O R D E R Mr. Sikander Sadar Siddiqui, Advocate holds brief for Syed Zulfiqar Ali Shah, learned counsel for the Petitioner submits that the official respondents at the behest of private respondents are causing harassment for the petitioner. Mr. Saeed Ahmed Wassan, Assistant Advocate General present in Court waives notice of this petition and states that the official respondents will strictly act in accordance with the law and provide protection to the petitioner as and when required. Learned counsel holding brief being satisfied with the undertaking given by learned AAG Sindh seeks disposal of this petition in the above terms. Order accordingly. Petitioner stands disposed of along with listed applications. A copy of this order be provided to learned AAG Sindh for compliance. Judge ARBROHI
